   "body_snippet": "## Expected Behavior\r\nWhen protocol is set to HTTP or HTTPS \r\nHostname/IP field must not contain port number of server.\r\nbecause port number is specified in Port field.\r\n\r\n## Current Behavior\r\nPort number specified in Port field is ignored. The port number must be embedded in Hostname/IP field.\r\n\r\n## Possible Solution\r\n- Remove `Port` number field and `Protocol` fields for Browser connections as the URI contains all the required information.\r\n\r\nVersion 1.77.2",

   "priority": "P2-bug",
   "target_release": null,
   "our_branch": null,
@@ -22,6 +22,18 @@

       "type": "triaged",
       "description": "The current URL construction logic in HTTPBase.cs can result in double port numbers if a port is embedded in the hostname field and also specified in the port field."

-  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The current URL construction logic in HTTPBase.cs can result in double port numbers if a port is embedded in the hostname field and also specified in the port field.\nApproach: Refactor the GetUrl() method in HTTPBase.cs to use UriBuilder for robust URL construction, correctly handling embedded ports in the hostname and prioritizing explicit port field values while avoiding double-port issues."

   "created_at": "2022-06-03T18:33:27Z",
   "github_updated_at": "2026-02-21T10:22:46Z",
   "body_snippet": "## Expected Behavior\r\nSelect `Edge Chromium` renderer and initiate connection and have the page load.\r\n\r\n## Current Behavior\r\nSelect `Edge Chromium` renderer and initiate connection and page never loads / renders.\r\n\r\n## Possible Solution\r\nFix / finish the feature or provide an error or some sort of display if something went wrong.\r\n\r\n## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)\r\nCreate an `Edge Chromium` connection and try to get it to work.\r\n\r\n## Your Environment\r\n\r\n* Version used: 1.77.2\r\n* Operating Syst...",
-  "our_status": "new",
-  "priority": null,
+  "our_status": "triaged",
+  "priority": "P2-bug",
   "target_release": null,
   "our_branch": null,
   "our_pr": null,
-  "iterations": [],
+  "iterations": [
+    {
+      "seq": 1,
+      "date": "2026-02-23",
+      "type": "triaged",
+      "description": "The Edge Chromium rendering engine (WebView2) is reported as not working, indicating a bug in its initialization or usage within mRemoteNG's HTTP protocol connections."
+    }
+  ],
   "comments": [
     {
       "id": "IC_kwDOAAcIMM5OJDGD",
@@ -86,5 +93,5 @@
   "needs_action": true,
   "waiting_for_us": false,
   "last_synced": "2026-02-21T12:06:48Z",
-  "notes": ""
+  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The Edge Chromium rendering engine (WebView2) is reported as not working, indicating a bug in its initialization or usage within mRemoteNG's HTTP protocol connections.\nApproach: Investigate the InitializeWebView2Async method and CoreWebView2InitializationCompleted event handler in Connection.Protocol.HTTPBase.cs to identify failures in WebView2 initialization, environment creation, or navigation, potentially by adding detailed logging."
 }
diff --git a/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2242.json b/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2242.json
index b11f3c44d..5ade1e064 100644
--- a/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2242.json
+++ b/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2242.json
@@ -11,12 +11,19 @@
   "created_at": "2022-06-06T16:06:08Z",
   "github_updated_at": "2026-02-21T10:23:29Z",
   "body_snippet": "I have noticed the mysql/mssql integration coming in, and wanted to toss out the potential of a NoSQL db that works great and is tightly integrated in .NET.\r\n\r\nhttps://github.com/mbdavid/LiteDB\r\n\r\n* IMO, having less installs, running procs, and dependencies on external entities is always great.",
-  "our_status": "new",
-  "priority": null,
+  "our_status": "triaged",
+  "priority": "P3-enhancement",
   "target_release": null,
   "our_branch": null,
   "our_pr": null,
-  "iterations": [],
+  "iterations": [
+    {
+      "seq": 1,
+      "date": "2026-02-23",
+      "type": "triaged",
+      "description": "To provide a lightweight, embedded NoSQL database option for new beta features and integrations, offering flexibility and an alternative to existing SQL-based connectors, specifically for new data models."
+    }
+  ],
   "comments": [
     {
       "id": "IC_kwDOAAcIMM7mYhkV",
@@ -33,5 +40,5 @@
   "needs_action": false,
   "waiting_for_us": false,
   "last_synced": "2026-02-21T12:06:48Z",
-  "notes": ""
+  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): To provide a lightweight, embedded NoSQL database option for new beta features and integrations, offering flexibility and an alternative to existing SQL-based connectors, specifically for new data models.\nApproach: Introduce LiteDB as an embedded NoSQL database by adding the LiteDB NuGet package and establishing a dedicated data access layer (e.g., context and unit of work) to manage LiteDB instances and operations. This will allow new beta integrations to leverage LiteDB's document-oriented capabilities without being constrained by the existing SQL-centric IDatabaseConnector."
 }

   "github_updated_at": "2022-08-04T15:49:09Z",
   "body_snippet": "## Desired Behavior\r\nAt present it's possible to import remote desktop connection manager and RDP files.\r\nHowever as far as I can see there's no support for the Microsoft Remote Desktop app backupfiles:\r\nhttps://apps.microsoft.com/store/detail/microsoft-remote-desktop/9WZDNCRFJ3PS?hl=en-gb&gl=GB\r\nThese have the extension .rdb.\r\n\r\n## Current Behavior\r\nCurrently not supported\r\n\r\n## Context\r\nI'm a poor soul coming from another Microsoft product (I have seen the errors of my ways) and I'm having to ...",
-  "our_status": "new",
-  "priority": null,
+  "our_status": "triaged",
+  "priority": "P3-enhancement",
   "target_release": null,
   "our_branch": null,
   "our_pr": null,
-  "iterations": [],
+  "iterations": [
+    {
+      "seq": 1,
+      "date": "2026-02-23",
+      "type": "triaged",
+      "description": "Implement functionality to import connection backups from Microsoft Remote Desktop Client."
+    }
+  ],
   "comments": [
     {
       "id": "IC_kwDOAAcIMM5FWj-O",
@@ -52,5 +59,5 @@
   "needs_action": true,
   "waiting_for_us": true,
   "last_synced": "2026-02-15T09:52:50Z",
-  "notes": ""
+  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): Implement functionality to import connection backups from Microsoft Remote Desktop Client.\nApproach: Analyze Microsoft Remote Desktop Client backup format, implement a new deserializer to parse the backup file, map its properties to mRemoteNG connection objects, and add a UI entry point for the import process. Include comprehensive unit tests."
 }
